extraction.one_line_summary: COBRELLI Sonny won a sprint finish at Roubaix velodrome after surviving brutal wet conditions, outsprinting VERMEERSCH and VAN DER POEL
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma riders showed superior bike handling on wet tarmac while Deceuninck teammates repeatedly crashed, revealing equipment/setup differences.
MOSCONI nearly won from breakaway before being caught at velodrome, suggesting early aggression nearly worked despite wet conditions.
VAN DER POEL expended too much energy bridging/leading into velodrome, visibly destroyed at finish despite reaching final sprint.

rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: negative: crashed early requiring teammate assistance, then overextended approaching velodrome leaving nothing for sprint despite making podium
rider_signals.VERMEERSCH Florian: positive: second place as emerging rider suggests he can handle extreme wet cobbles better than established stars
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: multiple crashes on wet tarmac before cobbles even started, indicating serious equipment or condition adaptation issues
rider_signals.LAMPAERT Yves: negative: fell early despite being Deceuninck leader and 2019 third place, same equipment issues as teammates
rider_signals.MOSCONI Gianni: positive: nearly won from breakaway finishing fourth, proving aggressive early moves viable even in wet Monument conditions
